question: Based on the chart, which statement about how time is allocated is supported by the data?

options.A: Work takes up the smallest share of time.
options.B: Commute takes up more time than any other single activity.
options.C: Leisure and Chores together account for more than half of the time.
options.D: Sleep takes up the largest share of time.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Commute: 35%; Chores: 28%; Sleep: 22%; Work: 8%; Leisure: 7%.
